body.title: Audit credential flow through Igor agent context and document findings
body.result: Static audit complete: API key boundary is correct (env vars + headers only). Gap: ~50 hardcoded DSN literals in wild_igor/ and lab/ bypass paths.py pattern. Findings doc at lab/docs/credential_audit_2026-05-21.md. Follow-up: T-complete-dsn-hardcode-migration-50-remai.
body.description:
From URL 17 (VentureBeat enterprise credentials): 'In most deployments, the agent carries authentication tokens with it — a compromised agent takes the keys with it.' Correct architecture: credentials live at the network boundary, not inside the agent context. Audit Igor's pe_chain basket, palace nodes, cc_queue metadata, and MCP tool call patterns for any credential-in-context patterns. Document findings; file follow-up tickets for any credentials that need to move to boundary layer.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/tools/pe_chain.py, lab/claudecode/cc_queue.py, devices/ (device configs), any palace nodes containing connection strings
**Design rules:** none — static audit
**Scope boundary:** In scope: static code and config audit for credential patterns; written findings doc. Out of scope: actual credential migration (follow-up tickets from findings).
**Test plan:** No automated tests — observation ticket. Done when: findings doc exists at lab/docs/credential_audit_2026-05-21.md; all identified patterns have filed follow-up tickets or explicit 'acceptable' determination.
